bird.summary: The yellow-throated bush sparrow (Gymnoris superciliaris), also known as the yellow-throated petronia, is a species of bird in the sparrow…

locations.name: 森林
locations.summary: 森林，是一个高密度树木的区域（或历史上，森林是一个为狩猎而留出的荒地），涵蓋大約9.4％的地球表面（或佔約30％的總土地面積）。聯合國糧食及農業組織(FAO)將森林定義為「面積超過 0.5 公頃、樹木超過 5 公尺且樹冠覆蓋率超過 10%…

relations.subject: Yellow-throated bush sparrow
relations.evidence: It is found in south-central and southern Africa in its natural habitats of subtropical or tropical dry forests, dry savanna, and subtropical or tropical dry shrubland
